hero.headline: Your Pool, Treated Like Our Own
hero.subheadline: Hunter and the Just Poolin' crew handle every detail of your pool and hot tub care — so your only job is to grab a towel and jump in. Nashville's owner-operated pool service built on trust, not contracts.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool & Hot Tub Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Nashville Homeowners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to green pool rescues, we keep your backyard oasis sparkling so you never have to think twice about water chemistry again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Routine cleaning, water chemistry balancing, equipment inspection, and adjustments to keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Regular maintenance, cleaning, and water chemistry management for hot tubs to ensure safe and enjoyable soaking year-round.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Specialized algae elimination and water chemistry restoration to bring murky, neglected pools back to crystal-clear condition — fast.

cards.title: Pool Opening
cards.description: Seasonal pool opening including cover removal, water balancing, thorough equipment inspection, and full system startup so you're swim-ready on day one.

cards.title: Pool Closing & Winterization
cards.description: Complete winterization service including cleaning, equipment inspection, chemical treatment, and cover installation to protect your pool through Tennessee winters.

cards.title: Airbnb Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Specialized pool care for short-term rental owners — your pool stays guest-ready, compliant, and sparkling between every booking.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or hot tub. Hunter will personally assess your setup and provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our certified team arrives on schedule, every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — every detail handled with care, as if it were our own pool.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready week after week. Not happy with a visit? We come back and make it right — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Nashville Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Means Every Pool Gets the Hunter Touch
about.description: Founded in 2024 by Hunter, Just Poolin' was built on a simple idea: treat every pool like it's your own. We're not a franchise or a faceless corporation — we're your neighbors in Nashville. From Belle Meade to Brentwood, we show up on time, get the chemistry right, and never cut corners. That's why every one of our reviews is five stars.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Hunter personally oversees every pool. You'll never wonder who's in your backyard — it's always someone who knows your pool inside and out.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print. Just great pool care.

features.title: Airbnb & Rental Specialists
features.description: We keep short-term rental pools guest-ready around the clock — so your reviews stay five stars and your guests keep coming back.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no commitments.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call Hunter directly. We'll come back and make it right at no extra charge — no questions asked. Your pool should be the best part of your day, and we won't stop until it is.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Nashville area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer next-day response. Just call Hunter directly and we'll get you on the schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our Nashville clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll get a service summary after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Hot tub maintenance is one of our specialties. We handle cleaning, water chemistry, and regular upkeep so your spa is always ready for a relaxing soak — year-round.

faqs.question: What areas of Nashville do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Belle Meade, Green Hills, East Nashville, West Meade, Sylvan Park, Forest Hills, Franklin, Brentwood, and Mount Juliet. If you're in the Greater Nashville area, give us a call!

faqs.question: Can you maintain my Airbnb rental pool?
faqs.answer: That's one of our specialties! We keep short-term rental pools guest-ready at all times, ensuring your property stays compliant with safety standards and your guests always have a great experience.

testimonials.name: Nashville Homeowner
testimonials.text: Hunter has done a great job servicing our pool and treated it like his own! The water has never looked better and he's always on time. Highly recommend Just Poolin' to anyone in Nashville.

testimonials.name: Brentwood Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Hunter is a very professional hard working young man. He is always open to my ideas and questions about our pool. Since switching to Just Poolin', our pool has never been cleaner.

testimonials.name: Airbnb Host
testimonials.text: Managing an Airbnb in Nashville means the pool has to be perfect for every guest. Hunter keeps it sparkling between bookings and I never have to worry. Five stars from every guest since we started.
